prose:
Method-provenance summary
Property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap of triplet O2, in electron-volts (eV)
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting)
Geometry provenance: user-supplied fixed geometry from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz; single-point calculation (DFT//input geometry), no re-optimization
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 3 (open-shell; unrestricted UKS)
Software: PySCF (backend invoked by chemkit frontier-orbitals skill)
SCF convergence: converged in 7 cycles; gradient/SCF criteria met
Warnings: no warnings reported by the engine
Live log: calculation was streamed to a live .out file (path printed at launch by chemkit; available for review)
Engine integrity verdict: trustworthy = true

Headline value
HOMO–LUMO gap (|ε_LUMO − ε_HOMO|): 5.288058566348997 eV

The calculation was performed with chemkit’s "frontier-orbitals" skill using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level on the provided O2 geometry, in the gas phase, with charge 0 and triplet multiplicity (UKS).
